output.context: Re-check after padding refactor: section py-10 sm:py-24 changed to py-10 sm:py-16, container received py-10 md:py-24 to move vertical padding inside the charcoal background panel.

build.notes: Build compiles with only performance warnings (bundle size). No TypeScript errors.

issues.description: ArrowLeft import is defined but never used (line 21). SVGs are rendered via theme_block_asset() in PHP, so the TSX imports are unused.
ArrowRight import is defined but never used (line 22). Same reason as FQA-001.
BaseControl with label but no id prop (line 198). WordPress lint rule requires id when label is passed.
issues.fix: Add id prop to BaseControl, e.g. id="dynamic-content-carousel-selected-content"

lint.notes: The __experimentalToggleGroupControl and react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings are pre-existing patterns used across the project and not introduced by this change.

registration.notes: block.json valid, apiVersion 3, all files present.

attributes.notes: All attributes defined with correct types and defaults. No attribute changes in this revision.

accessibility.notes: Navigation buttons have aria-label and title. Sections with headings use aria-labelledby, sections without heading use aria-label='Content Carousel'. Swiper A11y module loaded.

tsxPhpSync.notes: TSX and PHP section classes match exactly: 'dynamic-content-carousel dark bg-transparent! py-10 sm:py-16'. Container classes match exactly: 'container relative py-10 md:py-24 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8'. Both files updated consistently for the padding refactor.

specCompliance.notes: 10 sections rendered on test page (9 block instances in raw content, one hideIfEmpty variation still shows because policies exist). All variations from spec present. Padding change is an intentional post-spec revision.

issues.description: ArrowLeft import is defined but never used
issues.fix: Remove unused import: import { ReactComponent as ArrowLeft } from './resources/ArrowLeft.svg';

issues.description: ArrowRight import is defined but never used
issues.fix: Remove unused import: import { ReactComponent as ArrowRight } from './resources/ArrowRight.svg';

issues.description: BaseControl with label but missing id prop

passedChecks: All attributes save with correct types and defaults

Container py-10 md:py-24 added in both files to place padding inside charcoal panel
Navigation buttons have proper aria-label and title attributes
Sections with headings use aria-labelledby, without use aria-label fallback
All 10 test page variations render correctly
Swiper initializes with correct data attributes on all carousel instances
hideIfEmpty variant still shows when policies exist (correct behavior)
Manual selection variant with empty selectedPosts correctly hides carousel
